summary: Plan to expand pirate niche prompts to properly support both 'Chiến Hạm Huyền Thoại' (ship) and 'Thành Trì Vô Luật' (location) frameworks. Uses dual-branch [SHIP]/[LOCATION] approach within the same prompt files rather than duplicating files. Changes affect outline, writer, and review prompts. No code changes needed since subject_type is already wired.
